title: RSW Harvey & Mason 6 Exquisite Flock 13.5" Crackers – Luxury Christmas Table Crackers with Velvet Finish, Satin Ribbon & Pearl Detail – Includes Hats, Mottos & Premium Gifts
features: LUXURY CHRISTMAS CRACKERS – Box of 6 x 13.5-inch crackers with red and green velvet board and gold foil detail
PREMIUM DESIGN – Finished with gold satin ribbon and silver and gold pearl embellishments for a sophisticated festive look
SUPERIOR CONTENTS – Each cracker contains a hat, motto and a quality gift such as a bracelet, cufflinks, perfume atomiser or similar
STUNNING TABLE DISPLAY – Wide-barrelled crackers designed to make a statement on your Christmas table
PERFECT FOR ENTERTAINING – Ideal for family gatherings, Christmas dinner parties and festive celebrations
description: Bring elegance and sophistication to your festive table with the RSW Harvey & Mason Exquisite Flock 13.5" Crackers. Expertly crafted to the highest standard, these deluxe crackers feature a stunning design with gold foil detail set against a rich red and green velvet board. Finished with gold satin ribbon and beautiful silver and gold pearl embellishments, they make a luxurious statement on any Christmas table setting. Each cracker contains a paper hat and motto, along with a superior quality gift such as a bracelet, key bottle opener, perfume atomiser, cufflinks, glasses repair screwdriver, or trolley coin keyring. These thoughtful, practical gifts are designed to be enjoyed long after the festive season ends. Perfect for Christmas dinner parties or special holiday gatherings, these crackers add a touch of glamour and create a memorable experience for your guests. Their wide-barrelled shape and detailed finish make them an eye-catching centrepiece, turning your dining table into a truly festive display. WARNING! DO NOT PULL INNER OUTSIDE PARTY CRACKER. PULL CRACKER AWAY FROM FACE. DO NOT PULL NEAR EYES OR EARS. PULL BOTH ENDS AT ARMS LENGTH FIRMLY AND SHARPLY. DO NOT REMOVE INNER. WARNING! Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts which could represent a choking hazard. Contents may include glass and items with functional sharp points or edges. Adult supervision is required. Items may fall from crackers whilst pulling.
